title: Mespilodaphne staminea

uses: Mespilodaphne staminea is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. Its bark and leaves are used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The plant is also used to treat diarrhea, dysentery, and other gastrointestinal problems. In addition, Mespilodaphne staminea has been used to treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of its medicinal uses.
